title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 15–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Cracker, Sanji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take heed... If you truly consider Vinsmoke Sanji your friend, just leave him be. He is a bonafide Prince from a powerful country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His roots occupy a territory that you mere peasants could never hope to touch!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He shall be wed to the perfect wife... and lead a carefree life without any troubles...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You want to "take him back"... Honestly, how selfish can you be?! You would have the nerve to destroy the happiness of a man you dare call your "friend"?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if by some miracle you were able to reach him once more, that man of Royal Blood would simply let out a sigh of exasperation and say in no uncertain terms...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Leave this instant!! The sight of all you lowly pirates sickens me!!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you ever put words in Sanji's mouth!!! Even if he was happy and didn't want to leave here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "There's no way he'd ever speak to us like that!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 18 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
